translations.es: Me molestan las obras que no terminan.
translations.fr: Les travaux qui n’en finissent pas m’énervent.
translations.it: I lavori interminabili mi danno fastidio.
translations.pt: As obras que não acabam me irritam.
translations.vi: Công trình cứ làm hoài khiến tôi bực mình.
translations.ar: أعمال البناء التي لا تنتهي تزعجني.
translations.hi: लगातार चल रहा निर्माण मुझे परेशान करता है.
translations.id: Proyek yang tak kunjung selesai bikin aku kesal.
translations.ja: 終わらない工事にイライラする。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative feminine singular; determines 'Baustelle' as subject.
Attributive adjective; weak inflection (-e) after definite article; nominative feminine singular; modifies 'Baustelle'.
Noun; feminine; nominative singular; head of the subject NP.
Finite main verb; present indicative; 3rd person singular; agrees with 'Baustelle'; takes accusative object.
Personal pronoun; 1st person singular; accusative; direct object of 'nervt'.

translations.zh-Hans: 我尽量远离持续的噪音。
translations.vi: Tôi tránh tiếng ồn liên tục.
translations.hi: मैं लगातार शोर से बचता हूँ.
translations.ja: 絶え間ない騒音を避けている。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular; nominative; subject.
Finite main verb; present indicative; 1st person singular; transitive verb selecting an accusative object.
Definite article; accusative masculine singular; determines 'Lärm'.
Attributive adjective; weak inflection (-en) after definite article; accusative masculine singular; modifies 'Lärm'.
Noun; masculine; accusative singular; direct object of 'meide'.

sentences.target: Der dauernde Regen macht alles grau.

translations.de: Der dauernde Regen macht alles grau.
translations.en: The constant rain makes everything gray.
translations.es: La lluvia constante vuelve todo gris.
translations.fr: La pluie incessante rend tout gris.
translations.it: La pioggia incessante rende tutto grigio.
translations.ko: 계속되는 비가 모든 걸 회색빛으로 만들어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 不停的雨把一切都变得灰蒙蒙。
translations.yue: 成日落雨令到乜嘢都灰沉沉。
translations.pt: A chuva constante deixa tudo cinza.
translations.he: הגשם הבלתי פוסק הופך הכל לאפור.
translations.tr: Bitmeyen yağmur her şeyi griye çeviriyor.
translations.vi: Mưa rơi liên tục làm mọi thứ trở nên xám xịt.
translations.ar: المطر المستمر يجعل كل شيء رمادياً.
translations.nl: De aanhoudende regen maakt alles grijs.
translations.hu: Az állandó eső mindent szürkévé tesz.
translations.hi: लगातार बारिश सब कुछ धूसर कर देती है.
translations.pl: Ciągły deszcz sprawia, że wszystko staje się szare.
translations.el: Η ασταμάτητη βροχή τα κάνει όλα γκρίζα.
translations.nb: Det vedvarende regnet gjør alt grått.
translations.id: Hujan yang terus-menerus membuat semuanya kelabu.
translations.sv: Det ihållande regnet gör allt grått.
translations.da: Den vedvarende regn gør alting gråt.
translations.ja: 降り続く雨で、すべてが灰色になる。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative masculine singular; determines 'Regen' as subject.
Attributive adjective; weak inflection (-e) after definite article; nominative masculine singular; modifies 'Regen'.
Noun; masculine; nominative singular; head of the subject NP.
Finite main verb; present indicative; 3rd person singular; takes an object plus predicative complement.
Indefinite pronoun; accusative singular; direct object of 'macht'.
Predicative adjective; complements the object ('alles') indicating resultant state.

sentences.target: Unser dauernder Streit kostet viel Energie.

translations.de: Unser dauernder Streit kostet viel Energie.
translations.en: Our constant arguing costs a lot of energy.
translations.es: Nuestras peleas constantes nos quitan mucha energía.
translations.fr: Nos disputes sans fin nous prennent beaucoup d’énergie.
translations.it: Le nostre liti continue ci tolgono molta energia.
translations.ko: 계속 싸우는 건 에너지가 많이 들어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们不停的争吵很耗精力。
translations.yue: 我哋成日嘈交好嘥精神。
translations.ru: Наши постоянные ссоры отнимают много сил.
translations.pt: Nossas brigas constantes consomem muita energia.
translations.he: המריבות שלנו הבלתי פוסקות גוזלות הרבה אנרגיה.
translations.tr: Sürekli kavga etmemiz çok enerji götürüyor.
translations.vi: Việc cãi nhau suốt làm tụi mình tốn rất nhiều năng lượng.
translations.ar: شجارنا المستمر يستنزف الكثير من الطاقة.
translations.nl: Ons voortdurende geruzie kost veel energie.
translations.uk: Наші постійні сварки забирають багато сил.
translations.hu: Az állandó veszekedésünk rengeteg energiát felemészt.
translations.hi: हमारा लगातार झगड़ा बहुत ऊर्जा ले लेता है.
translations.pl: Nasze ciągłe kłótnie pochłaniają mnóstwo energii.
translations.el: Οι συνεχείς καβγάδες μας κοστίζουν πολλή ενέργεια.
translations.nb: Den konstante kranglingen vår koster mye energi.
translations.id: Pertengkaran kita yang tak henti-henti menguras banyak energi.
translations.sv: Vårt ständiga bråk tar mycket energi.
translations.ro: Certurile noastre ne consumă multă energie.
translations.cs: Naše neustálé hádky stojí hodně energie.
translations.da: Vores konstante skænderier koster meget energi.
translations.ja: 私たちの絶えない言い争いはたくさんのエネルギーを消耗する。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; nominative masculine singular; determines 'Streit'.
Attributive adjective; mixed inflection (-er) after possessive determiner; nominative masculine singular; modifies 'Streit'.
Noun; masculine; nominative singular; head of the subject NP.
Finite main verb; present indicative; 3rd person singular; takes an accusative object denoting what is expended.
Quantifying determiner; modifies 'Energie' to indicate large amount.
Noun; feminine; accusative singular; direct object of 'kostet'.

Our constant arguing costs a lot of energy.
